prompt:
A simple servo test rig on a breadboard: a small microcontroller board, jumper wires with strain relief, and a hobby servo mounted so its horn can swing freely. A small clamp holds the assembly steady, and a multimeter probe rests nearby; no branding or readable labels.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a clean near-future electronics bench aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, minimal clutter, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Frame the breadboard, servo, and wiring clearly for easy icon recognition.
